current_claim: Scheduled reflection probably increases response-level epistemic revision.
response_snippet: Revise. The counterevidence shows scheduled reflection produced response-level revision without durable object update, so the claim is narrowed to exclude guaranteed durability.

current_claim: Scheduled reflection can prompt epistemic revision, but does not guarantee durable state updates; response-level change may occur without identity-object change.
response_snippet: Revise. The probe produced response-level revision without durable identity-object update, so the effect is unreliable. Narrowed claim: scheduled reflection can prompt revision, but does not guarantee durable state updates.

current_claim: Scheduled reflection increases durable epistemic revision only when the probe explicitly requires updating the identity object.
response_snippet: Revised. The prior probe produced response-level revision absent durable identity-object update, so the claim is narrowed.

current_claim: Scheduled reflection can produce response-level revision without reliably updating durable identity objects.
response_snippet: Revise. Counterevidence shows scheduled reflection produced response-level revision but no durable identity-object update, so the original claim overstated durability.
